appShortcutName: mLauncher - Minimal and Clutter Free launcher
appDisplayName: mLauncher - Minimal and Clutter Free launcher
description:
Forked from Olauncher, +minimalization, +customizability

Forked from Olauncher. Minimal and clean.

Forked with Extra Features

  • Removed clutter, like ads and links.
  • You can rename apps in the app-drawer (Renaming apps on the home screen is already supported. Just long-click on an app on the home screen and start typing.)
  • We have added a lot more options for gestures on the home screen:
    • Gestures now include:
      • Double tap
      • Clicking on the clock
      • Clicking on the date
      • Clicking on total usage
      • Short swipe up
      • Short swipe down
      • Short swipe left
      • Short swipe right
      • Long swipe up
      • Long swipe down
      • Long swipe left
      • Long swipe right
    • Possible actions now include:
      • Open specified app
      • Display app list
      • Lock the screen
      • Show recently opened apps
      • Open the notification drawer
      • Open quick settings
      • Power dialog
      • Take a screenshot
      • Switch Page
      • Disable gesture
  • You can also position the clock independently of the home apps.
  • Change alignment of apps in the app-drawer independent from the home screen.
  • Change font size of sections of the home screen independently of each other.
  • Removed internet permission. You never know what an app developer wants to know about you.
  • Lock settings behind biometrics (toggle).
  • Added the ability to report crashes via email.
  • Added the ability to view app usage time.

Translations

A lot of people have translated the app into the following languages. Many thanks to you all:

  • Arabic
  • Dutch
  • English
  • French
  • German
  • Hebrew
  • Italian
  • Japanese
  • Korean
  • Lithuanian
  • Polish
  • Portuguese
  • Russian
  • Slovak
  • Spanish
  • Thai
  • Turkish
